basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.nio.res.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NIO Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Electronics / Computer science / Information Technology / Applied Geology or MCA or equivalent degree
qualification.details: M.Sc. Electronics / Computer science / Information Technology / Applied Geology or MCA or equivalent degree

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR NIO Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR NIO is 19th July 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Electronics, Computer Science, Information Technology, Applied Geology, or an equivalent MCA degree to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I post in the CSIR NIO recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - I position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate - I position is a temporary job role at CSIR NIO.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the CSIR National Institute of Oceanography located?
faq.answer: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography is located in Goa.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is GAR2175/3238-26.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
